name: OREGE
summary: OREGE is a cleantech company that develops and markets solutions for the treatment of sludge from wastewater treatment plants. The company's patented SOF (Sludge Optimization Facility) technology reduces sludge volume and improves its dewaterability; headquarters are located in Voisins-le-Bretonneux, France. OREGE aims to reduce the environmental impact of sludge management.
